please_start_a_chat_with_yourself_saved_: Please start a chat with yourself ('Saved Messages') first to use as a sync channel.
this_session_has_been_logged_out_remotel: This session has been logged out remotely.
could_not_decrypt_your_stored_keys_pleas: Could not decrypt your stored keys. Please restore your account if the password has changed.
only_the_group_creator_can_delete_the_gr: Only the group creator can delete the group.
you_must_restore_your_keys_from_your_rec: You must restore your keys from your recovery phrase before you can send messages.
sandbox_limit_reached_verify_your_accoun: Sandbox limit reached! Verify your account to unlock unlimited messaging.
internal_error_active_conversation_not_f: Internal error: Active conversation not found.
turnstile_missing: Turnstile not found. Please complete the security challenge to continue.
cannot_retry_file_messages_automatically: Cannot retry file messages automatically. Please try uploading again.
failed_to_rotate_group_keys: CRITICAL: Failed to rotate keys for group. The chat is insecure.
